home.subtitle: Residential and commercial
home.paragraph1: The buildup of dust, mold, allergens and contaminants in your ducts can affect your health and reduce the energy efficiency of your systems. Regular duct maintenance not only improves indoor air quality, but also extends the lifespan of your equipment.
home.paragraph2: At FlowTech, we provide specialized duct and heat pump cleaning services to deliver healthier air, better system performance and optimal energy efficiency. We use professional equipment and advanced techniques to remove dust, mold, allergens and contaminants accumulated in your ducts.

contact.title: Let's talk about your indoor air
contact.intro: Contact us today by phone or email to get a fast, no-obligation quote.

footer.tagline: Duct, heat pump and HVAC system cleaning.

details.title: Our services
details.paragraph1: Explore our main specialized cleaning services to improve system performance and the quality of your indoor air.

service1.name: Complete heat pump cleaning service
service1.description: A full cleaning designed to improve your heat pump performance and extend its lifespan.

service2.name: Dryer vent cleaning service
service2.description: A safe vent cleaning service that helps reduce buildup and improve dryer efficiency.

service3.name: Air exchanger cleaning service
service3.description: A precise air exchanger cleaning service that supports better airflow and healthier air.
